title: Quentin Tarantino interview: 'I'm shutting your butt down!'

markers.name: loaded_language
markers.excerpt: laying waste to a genocidal white racist class in the institution of slavery
markers.explanation: The speaker uses emotionally charged, vivid phrasing ('laying waste,' 'genocidal white racist class') to frame the antagonists, which intensifies moral judgment beyond neutral description.

markers.name: repetition_emphasis
markers.excerpt: this happens and this happens and this happens and this happens and that happens
markers.explanation: The speaker repeats 'this happens' multiple times to rhetorically diminish the alternative (a straightforward historical narrative) by making it sound monotonous.
